title: EaseonSS - HandyChest
description: Open ender chests and shulker boxes instantly by right-clicking in the air while holding them.
body:
# 🌿 Easeon – HandyChest **This mod requires EaseonSS-Core** ## Overview **Handy Chest** is a lightweight Fabric mod that lets you open ender chests and shulker boxes instantly by right-clicking while holding them in your hand. No need to place them down anymore — just hold and open. Perfect for quick storage access during building, mining, or exploration.
Preview ![showcase](https://github.com/EaseonKit/EaseonSS-HandyChest/blob/main/showcase.webp?raw=true)

## Key Features - **Instant Access** – Open ender chests and shulker boxes directly from your hand - **No Placement Required** – Save time by skipping block placement and breaking - **Server-Side Simplicity** – Players don't need to install anything
## Commands All commands require OP level 2 permission. | Command | Description | | ----------------------------- | -------------------- | | /easeon handychest | View current status | | /easeon handychest | Enable/disable |
Configuration ```json { "enabled": true, "requiredOpLevel": 2 // Requires a server restart to take effect. } ``` `config/easeon/easeon.ss.handychest.json`

--- ### 🔗 More Easeon Mods Looking for more lightweight and practical mods in the same style? Check out other Easeon series mods here.
